name: AirPods Case
description: Premium silicone case with shock resistance, card slot, and wireless charging compatibility. Durable and stylish protection for your AirPods.

name: Bluetooth Beanie
description: Knit beanie with integrated earbuds, 8 hours playback, and touch controls. Perfect for winter activities and workouts.

name: Ceramic Coffee Drip
description: Hand-crafted ceramic pour-over set with engraved guide and hourglass timer. Elevate your daily coffee ritual.

name: Desk Organizer Dock
description: 7-slot modular dock with wireless charging pad, pen stand, and snack tray. Transform your desk into an organized hub.

name: Eco Yoga Mat
description: 100% natural rubber, extra cushion, printed alignment lines, and recyclable packaging. Support your practice and the planet.

name: Foldable Travel Jacket
description: Water-resistant, windproof, heat-retentive jacket that folds into its chest pocket. Pack light, travel smart.

name: Glass Smart Mug
description: Self-heating insulated glass mug with app temperature settings. Keep your beverage at the perfect temperature.

name: Home Scent Diffuser
description: Ultrasonic diffuser with RGB LED and 12 scents set. Create the perfect ambiance for any room.

name: Indoor Plant Kit
description: Beginner-friendly plants with self-watering pots and care app. Start your indoor garden today.

name: Jewelry Cleaning Wand
description: Ultrasonic jeweler with gentle foam and microfiber system. Keep your jewelry looking brand new.

name: Knife Sharpening Station
description: 4-stage diamond/ceramic sharpening guide with safety base. Professional-grade results at home.

name: LED Desk Lamp
description: Eye-care light with 5 spectra, motion sensor, and wireless charge base. Perfect for productivity.

name: Modular Backpack
description: Magnetic modular compartments, weatherproof fabric, and laptop sleeve. Organize every adventure.

name: Noise-Cancelling Earbuds
description: Adaptive ANC, 36h battery, and transparent hearing mode. Immerse yourself in crystal-clear audio.

name: Organic Skincare Set
description: Cleanser, toner, moisturizer, serum — all cruelty free. Nourish your skin naturally.

name: Portable Projector
description: Pocket-size 1080p, built-in speakers, WiFi mirroring. Movie nights anywhere, anytime.

name: Quick-Charge Power Bank
description: 30W GaN, 2 USB-C ports, LED status display. Charge everything in minutes.

name: Reusable Water Bottle
description: Insulated steel, rolling numeric counter, and leak-proof design. Stay hydrated, save the planet.

name: Smart Scale
description: Body composition tracking with Bluetooth app charts. Know your health at a glance.

name: Travel Pillow
description: Memory foam, cooling cover, detachable hood. Sleep comfortably anywhere.

name: UV Sanitizer Box
description: 60-second germ kill for phone, keys, glasses. Sanitize with UV light.

name: Virtual Fitness Subscription
description: Live classes, trainer AI corrections, track progress. Fitness on your terms.

name: Wireless Keyboard
description: Mechanical keys, multi-device switch, USB-C. Type in silence, work in style.

name: X-Factor Insulated Lunchbox
description: 6L insulated capacity, removable divider, leakproof design. Meal prep perfection.

name: Yoga Block + Strap Set
description: Eco foam block + adjustable strap + posture guide. Deepen your practice safely.

name: Zinc Supplement Pack
description: 100% zinc bisglycinate, vegan capsules, 30-day supply. Boost immunity naturally.
